description: 13 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between Patricia Dreghorn (CEO, UK Security Vetting) and the UK Security Vetting Team, CO
text:
UK Security Vetting Team, CO

From: Jcs
Sent: Mon 23/12/2024 6:41:37 PM (UTC)
To: Patricia Dreahorn Personal : Jcs
cS Michael Roberts
< rersonal >
Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

Good evening all. I had confirmation from Ian Collard today that clearance is required for this
role and so we are now working with FCDO. Lord Mandleson has been set up on NSVS anda
VCO has been allocated to progress at speed as soon as the case arrives with us. I will forward
Tan’ s email separately.

To not we are also progressing the DV for Third Party with an interview at 1lam
tomorrow and we await a further DV application for another high profile appointment
tomorrow

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: Jes

Date: 23 December 2024 at 17:53:12 GMT
To: Jes

Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

Hello

Please see below query from Trish. I have a feeling that you said you are
expecting to do his clearance?

Thanks
Jcs

JCS
Head of Policy, Public Affairs and Quality Assurance
UKSV, Government Security Group

Cabinet Office,
Personal

NSV Privacy Notice

36

-- Forwarded message ---------

: Patricia Dreghorn < Personal > Date:
Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 16:56

Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

To: JCs

Hi JCS
Sorry for the late mail.

Below is a tricky one. As a Lord, no clearance is required but as an executive
leader, I believe clearance is required? Do you have a view?

Many thanks, Trish

Patricia Dreghorn

UKSV CEO

UKSV, Government Security Group (GSG)
Cabinet Office

E: Personal

M.: Personal
NSV Privacy Notice

-- Forwarded message ---------

From: GCSOPrivateOffice Mailbox < Personal >
Date: Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 11:22

Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

To: Tom Bramley Personal , Patricia Dreghom
Personal UKSV Private Office Mailbox

Mailbox Personal
Forwarding on in case others are on leave,

Thank you,
Jcs

Private Office of Vincent Devine
Government Chief Security Officer

Government Security Function Cabinet Office

37


Private Office Shared Mailbox: Personal

JCS
Chief of Staff
Personal
Personal
JCS
Private Secretary
Personal
Personal

---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: Ian Collard * < Personal =:
Date: Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 11:12

Subject: Urgent vetting question

To: GCSOprivateoffice Personal

Personal > Cc: Michael Roberts

< Personal > Jes

z Jcs >, Vita Maynard < Personal

Michael, Vincent's team,

Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed)
appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson as the next UK Ambassador to
Washington.

The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process
(specifically for DV clearance) as a member of the House of Lords?

We think CO say he is exempt. But we want to double check given the policy
around public appointments, and whether that alters the calculation?

He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the
essence.

Best wishes,
Tan

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant

UK legislation

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

38
